Thanks for the contribution. A few things make review easier:

- One concern per PR. Mixing a refactor + a feature + a bugfix is fine
  for personal commits but slows down review here.
- Keep diffs scoped to what's described below.
- If the change is user-visible, mention how the user will encounter it.
-->

## How it was tested

- [ ] Local build runs and the change behaves as described
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`xcodebuild test -scheme Daisy`)
- [ ] New tests added where it made sense
- [ ] Tested across at least one of: Apple Intelligence / Anthropic / OpenAI / MCP summary path
